reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/651290643148390126/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xZM1p6Sk1NRXBHVUhWRFVXcElVbGMxY3pKRVVsRRAB

reviews.comment:
No suelo hacer reseñas, pero vale dedicarle un momento.
Pase anteayer, no suelo cargar en esa estación, y la verdad que tuve una experiencia muy agradable.
Agradable el ambiente, la atención, los baños impecables 🙌… nada que ver a otras YPF.
Gracias a los empleados que nos permiten esta experiencia, por su dedicación. Mención particular a Carla, quien me atendió súper atenta y amorosa, me prepararon el café tal cual lo pedí.
Gracias! Será un preferido desde ahora!

(Translated by Google)
I don't usually write reviews, but it's worth taking a moment to do this.
I stopped by the day before yesterday; I don't usually fill up at that station, and I had a really pleasant experience.
The atmosphere was great, the service was excellent, the restrooms were spotless 🙌… nothing like other YPF stations.
Thanks to the employees who made this experience possible, for their dedication. Special mention to Carla, who was incredibly attentive and friendly, and they made my coffee exactly as I asked.
Thank you! It'll be a favorite from now on!
